name: Maren

assets.name: Ranger
assets.description: Wilderness survival expert; can Resupply through hunting and foraging; bonuses when moving through wilds.

abilities.text: When you Resupply by hunting or foraging in the wild, add +1 and take +1 supply on a hit.
When you Undertake a Journey through wild terrain, add +1.
When you make a move aided by your knowledge of wilderness survival, add +1.

assets.name: Archer
assets.description: Skilled at ranged combat with a bow; can reroll dice on ranged strikes.

abilities.text: When you Strike or Clash at range, add +1. On a hit, you may also inflict 1 harm on another foe in the same location.
When you Enter the Fray by drawing your bow against a foe who is unaware of you or not yet in combat, add +2.
When you Resupply to recover arrows or bolts, add +2.

assets.name: Horse
assets.companion_description: Dun-coated mare with a scarred flank from an old wolf attack. Patient, sure-footed, bonded with Maren over three years of ranging.

abilities.text: When you Undertake a Journey, add +1.
When you Enter the Fray or Strike while mounted, add +1.
Once per fight, when you Endure Harm, your horse intervenes; you may take the hit to your horse's health instead of your own.

progress_tracks.title: Avenge Harrow's Crossing
progress_tracks.description: Find and destroy the warband that burned Harrow's Crossing, so that its survivors may finally grieve and rebuild.
progress_tracks.notes: Maren swore this oath three years ago on iron. The warband flew no banner. Progress will come through gathering information, tracking the warband, and ultimately confronting its leader.

progress_tracks.title: Rescue Pela
progress_tracks.description: Rescue Pela — a survivor of Harrow's Crossing — from a raider camp near the Thornwood before she is killed or moved. She is the only known witness who saw the warband leader's face.
progress_tracks.notes: Urgent. A traveling herbalist brought word at dusk. The camp is two days' ride east. Time is short.

notes: Maren carries a piece of iron around her neck with her oath carved into it. She has crow-black hair cut short and carries a longbow she has used since age sixteen. She speaks little about Harrow's Crossing but the grief runs deep. Her most stable relationship is with her horse, Cinder.
